REPLACE:agitator_prince_sabahaddin = { # Prince Sabahaddin de Neuchâtel
	first_name = Sabahaddin
	last_name = Osmanoglu
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:turkish
	religion = rel:sunni
	female = no
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_reformer
	birth_date = 1879.2.13
	dna = dna_sabahaddin_prince
	traits = {
		ambitious
		literary
		innovative
	}
	agitator_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
			c:TUR ?= this
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            OR = {
			    is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
			    is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
			}
        }
		earliest_usage_date = 1899.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1935.12.31
		chance = 25
	}
}
